goal: Desktop reading carry-over: the Save/Share action-row stranded at the page bottom on desktop instead of sitting in the sticky left rail beside the poster (the design's 'gateway' card).
done: Added a desktop-only (matchMedia >=1024px) gateway in js/reading.js that MOVES the existing .action-row node into the left-rail panel (.panel--spread for daily/question, .panel--celtic-cross for full) and tags it .action-row--rail; on <1024px it stays at its home position. Node is moved (not cloned) so the Save/Share id-bound handlers travel intact. detachActionRowToHome() runs at the top of renderReading() so the node is parked at its stable home (sibling of #reading-content) before any innerHTML wipe and can never be destroyed; a MutationObserver on #reading-content + an MQ change listener re-inject it once the rail rebuilds. Daily only injects after phase===REVEALED so the deal animation can't wipe it. CSS: shared @media block in reading.css styles .action-row.action-row--rail as a stacked full-width gateway card (cream surface, gold border), placed after the per-mode blocks to win the equal-specificity tie. Bumped cache-bust reading.js/reading.css ?v=20260625b->20260626a (and added the missing ?v on TH reading.css).
root_cause: .action-row is a static sibling of #reading-content (outside the desktop grid container), so pure CSS could not place it into the rail; the design needs a DOM move.
fix: Guarded desktop-only DOM move into the rail with deletion-safe detach-to-home + observer re-inject.
verified: Headless Chrome 1440px for all three modes (question/full/daily): Save+Share render as a stacked card in the sticky left rail under the poster. Mobile 390px: single-column, action-row untouched at home. The 'Meow Coins +N' popup renders CENTERED (fixed inset:0 modal) in every desktop view, so the sibling carry-over 'popup floats over the right column' is already resolved by the centred-modal design - no change made. node --check passes; node --test failures are pre-existing (localStorage shim missing locally, same on clean baseline).
